title: BEM-866 extract successful workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_successful_workflows')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
seen = {}
base = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if base.exists():
    for f in sorted(base.glob('*.json')):
        try:
            data = json.loads(f.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
        except:
            continue
        status = str(data.get('status') or '')
        workflow = str(data.get('workflow') or data.get('workflow_id') or '')
        if status.upper() == 'DISPATCHED' and workflow:
            seen[workflow] = seen.get(workflow, 0) + 1
            safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in workflow)[:100]
            marker = outdir / (str(count).zfill(3) + '_' + safe + '.md')
            marker.write_text('# BEM-866 successful workflow\nResult: ' + str(f) + '\nWorkflow: ' + workflow + '\nStatus: ' + status + '\nInputs keys: ' + ', '.join((data.get('inputs') or {}).keys()) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
            changed_files.append(str(marker))
            count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_SUCCESSFUL_WORKFLOWS_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 successful workflows\nTotal results: ' + str(count) + '\n\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in sorted(seen.items())) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('successful workflows extracted: ' + str(seen))
"""
No issue comments.
